message:
feat(providers): add env-var overrides and dynamic platform identity [bd-2vbks]

Replace hard-coded version strings, beta flags, and User-Agent headers
across Anthropic, Azure, Copilot, and Gemini providers with env-var
overridable accessors:

- anthropic: ANTHROPIC_OAUTH_BETA_FLAGS and CACHE_BETA_FLAG via
  PI_ANTHROPIC_BETA_FLAGS / PI_ANTHROPIC_CACHE_BETA_FLAG
- azure: bump DEFAULT_API_VERSION to 2024-12-01-preview; add
  azure_api_version() with PI_AZURE_API_VERSION override
- copilot: EDITOR_VERSION, COPILOT_USER_AGENT, GITHUB_API_VERSION
  via PI_COPILOT_* env vars
- gemini: replace hardcoded gl-node/22.17.0 and darwin/arm64 with
  dynamic values from crate::platform; antigravity version overridable
  via PI_AI_ANTIGRAVITY_VERSION

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
